title: Zappi Co Plush Children's Stuffed Soft Cuddly Plush Toy-Part of Safari Animals Collection, Perfect for Kids (26cm Height)(Bactrian Camel)
features: MADE FOR HUGS: This Bactrian Camel plush toy is great for cuddles! Soft and cozy, it makes a cuddly best friend for your child and can also be used for pretend play to bring their active imagination to life. Treat the little one to hours of fun, and cute, cuddly moments they’ll cherish. Measures 10" / 25cm head to tail.
OH SO CUTE: This stuffed Bactrian Camel toy spruces up any space with its cute design, beautiful beady eyes, and lovely touch of colour. Use it to decorate your baby’s room

QUALITY: We’ve designed this animal plush toy for kids to last through all those tight hugs and all that enthusiastic play. Can be washed on 40 degrees if any mess gets on them. The eyes are firmly set in place, strong stitching prevents the seams from easily unraveling, and the filling is made from recycled material

EDUCATIONAL: Introduce your child to the world of wildlife with this set of soft plush animal toys. Not only will your child love playing with them, but they will also learn the names of different animals and improve their vocabulary. This is a great way to give your child a head start and encourage a love for learning.

MACHINE WASHABLE: Easy to clean and maintain, our plush toys can be washed in the washing machine on a gentle cycle. It will retain its shape and softness, making it a toy that your child will love for a long time.
description: Product Description Bactrian Camel Plush Toy The Zappi Co ranges are constantly evolving, with new lines being added regularly. All of our products are designed here in the UK by our in-house team. We are committed to minimising our impact on the environment, using recyclable materials wherever possible. Our focus is particularly on the elimination of plastics. Age 0+ Fine to Wash at 40° Made From Recycled material Designed in the UK Shipped From UK Bactrian Camel Plush Toy Zappi Fact Did you know that the Bactrian camel is different from other camels because it has two humps? These humps store fat, which the camel can use as energy when food is scarce. The Bactrian camel is also adapted to the cold climate of its native habitat in Central and East Asia. Its thick fur and double hump help it to withstand freezing temperatures and strong winds. The Bactrian camel is a herbivorous species, feeding on a variety of plants, including grasses, shrubs, and herbs. It is able to go for long periods of time without drinking water Super Soft Playful Plush Bactrian Camel Soft Cuddly Toy Wipe Clean only
